pattern.pattern: On the phone, navigate to the hard keys menu via User/Device/Hard keys {param_1} {param_2} {param_3} {param_4} {param_5} {param_6} {param_7} {param_8} {param_9} {param_10} {param_11} {param_12} {param_13} {param_14} {param_15} {param_16} {param_17} {param_18} {param_19}
pattern.regex: On the phone, navigate to the hard keys menu via User/Device/Hard keys (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*) (.*)

examples: Verify the screen displays the title "Edit maximum 2 keys", the reset to default icon is grey, all options show radio buttons, only F1 hard key is selected, and all hard key names are grey. For ALE-30, two options appear: F1 cap icon/Phone A and transfer cap icon/Transfer. For ALE-300/400, three options appear: F1 cap icon/Phone A, transfer cap icon/Transfer, and conference cap icon/Conference. For ALE-500, three options appear: Triangle cap icon/Phone A, Circle cap icon/Home, and Square cap icon/Low power. On ALE-300/400, the i icon displays at the upper right corner of the screen.

pattern.pattern: Verify the screen displays the title "Edit maximum 2 keys", the reset to default icon is grey, all options show radio buttons, only F1 hard key is selected, and all hard key names are grey. For ALE-30, two options appear: F1 cap icon/Phone A and transfer cap icon/Transfer. For ALE-300/400, three options appear: F1 cap icon/Phone A, transfer cap icon/Transfer, and conference cap icon/Conference. For ALE-500, three options appear: Triangle cap icon/Phone A, Circle cap icon/Home, and Square cap icon/Low power. On ALE-300/400, the i icon displays at the upper right corner of the screen.
pattern.regex: Verify\ the\ screen\ displays\ the\ title\ "Edit\ maximum\ 2\ keys",\ the\ reset\ to\ default\ icon\ is\ grey,\ all\ options\ show\ radio\ buttons,\ only\ F1\ hard\ key\ is\ selected,\ and\ all\ hard\ key\ names\ are\ grey\.\ For\ ALE\-30,\ two\ options\ appear:\ F1\ cap\ icon/Phone\ A\ and\ transfer\ cap\ icon/Transfer\.\ For\ ALE\-300/400,\ three\ options\ appear:\ F1\ cap\ icon/Phone\ A,\ transfer\ cap\ icon/Transfer,\ and\ conference\ cap\ icon/Conference\.\ For\ ALE\-500,\ three\ options\ appear:\ Triangle\ cap\ icon/Phone\ A,\ Circle\ cap\ icon/Home,\ and\ Square\ cap\ icon/Low\ power\.\ On\ ALE\-300/400,\ the\ i\ icon\ displays\ at\ the\ upper\ right\ corner\ of\ the\ screen\.

examples: On OXE, do not configure the hard keys. On ALE-30, long press the F1 or F2 key. On ALE-300 or ALE-400, long press the F1, F2, or F3 key. On ALE-500, long press the Triangle, Circle, or Square key.

pattern.pattern: On OXE, do not configure the hard keys. On ALE-30, long press the F1 or F2 key. On ALE-300 or ALE-400, long press the F1, F2, or F3 key. On ALE-500, long press the Triangle, Circle, or Square key.
pattern.regex: On\ OXE,\ do\ not\ configure\ the\ hard\ keys\.\ On\ ALE\-30,\ long\ press\ the\ F1\ or\ F2\ key\.\ On\ ALE\-300\ or\ ALE\-400,\ long\ press\ the\ F1,\ F2,\ or\ F3\ key\.\ On\ ALE\-500,\ long\ press\ the\ Triangle,\ Circle,\ or\ Square\ key\.
